ucs.title: [LLM] Earth Lusca DLL side-loading via signed LOLBINs from non-default paths (Cobalt Strike / ScrambleCross loader chain)
ucs.description: Hunts Earth Lusca's signature loader chain where legitimate signed binaries (vmnat.exe, AppLaunch.exe, rdpclip.exe, GoogleUpdate.exe, cookie_exporter.exe, BDReinit.exe) are dropped into ProgramData/Public/AppData alongside a malicious DLL of the same name to side-load Cobalt Strike beacons, ScrambleCross or Doraemon backdoors. This pairing is repeatedly documented in Trend Micro / Mandiant reporting on TAG-22 / Charcoal Typhoon and is rarely seen as a benign coincidence.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("vmnat.exe","AppLaunch.exe","rdpclip.exe","GoogleUpdate.exe","cookie_exporter.exe","BDReinit.exe","GUP.exe","VMwareXferlogs.exe") AND (Processes.process_path="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Users\\Public\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\PerfLogs\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Temp\\*") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process_path Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process_path Processes.process_id | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | join type=inner host process_path [| tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_name="*.dll" by host Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.file_name | rename Filesystem.file_path as dll_path Filesystem.file_name as dll_name host as host | eval process_path=replace(dll_path,"\\\\[^\\\\]+\\.dll$","")] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.rationale: The specific binary list is taken from public Earth Lusca loader artefacts (vmnat/AppLaunch/cookie_exporter pairings used to load ScrambleCross, Cobalt Strike and BioPass-related DLLs). Legitimate vendors install these binaries to %ProgramFiles% and never run them out of ProgramData/PerfLogs/Public, so the path constraint plus an unsigned same-folder DLL load is a near-deterministic Earth Lusca si

ucs.title: [LLM] Earth Lusca post-exploitation web shell to LSASS dump on IIS / Tomcat (ProxyLogon / GlassFish chain)
ucs.description: Hunts Earth Lusca's characteristic chain after exploiting public-facing apps (Microsoft Exchange ProxyLogon, Oracle GlassFish, Tomcat) — w3wp.exe / java.exe spawning recon LOLBINs from a China Chopper or Behinder web shell, immediately followed by LSASS credential access via comsvcs.dll MiniDump or ProcDump. This kill-chain (T1190 → T1505.003 → T1059 → T1003.001) was specifically reported by Trend Micro for TAG-22 / Charcoal Typhoon against telcos, government and gambling targets.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.process_name) as childProcs from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("w3wp.exe","httpd.exe","tomcat*.exe","java.exe","javaw.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","whoami.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","systeminfo.exe","tasklist.exe","ipconfig.exe","quser.exe","nltest.exe","arp.exe","ping.exe","rundll32.exe","procdump.exe","procdump64.exe") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process_path Processes.process_name Processes.process_id | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | search parent_process_path="*\\inetpub\\*" OR parent_process_path="*\\wwwroot\\*" OR parent_process_path="*\\tomcat*" OR parent_process_path="*\\glassfish*" OR parent_process_path="*\\Exchange Server\\*" | join type=inner host [| tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process="*comsvcs.dll*MiniDump*" OR Processes.process="*lsass*\.dmp*" OR Processes.process_name IN ("procdump.exe","procdump64.exe") OR Processes.process="*-ma lsass*" OR Processes.process="*sekurlsa::*") by host Processes.user Processes.process Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename process as dump_cmd process_name as dump_proc] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.rationale: Earth Lusca / TAG-22 is one of the few Chinese clusters that pairs ProxyLogon-style web exploitation (China Chopper / Behinder web shells under inetpub or Exchange FrontEnd\HttpProxy) with the comsvcs.dll MiniDump trick on the same host within minutes — exactly the chain Trend Micro documented across their telecom and gambling intrusions. A web-server worker process spawning recon LOLBINs is rare
